query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.address, e.neighborhood, c.name as category, e.phone, e.hours, e.rating
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
WHERE e.id IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)
ORDER BY e.id;
command:

ORDER BY e.id;
